true_positives.context: Interpretation -------------- Consistent with early infection with Borrelia burg___. A new serum specimen should be submitted in ___ days to demonstrate seroconversion of IgG. ACTIVE ISSUES # Meningitis: Patient was started on broad coverage initially including acyclovir(though Lyme suspected given recent history of typical rash), this was narrowed to ceftrixone 2g daily once csf culture and hsv returned negative. true_positives.context: IMAGING: ==================== ___ CT Abd/Pelvis MPRESSION: 1. Large amount of tumor within the spleen with also involvement of the pancreatic tail and splenic hilum with extension into the splenic and gastroepiploic veins. As the majority of the tumor with is within the spleen, a splenic primary tumor such is an angiosarcoma is a primary consideration, however a primary pancreatic tail tumor is also possible. 2. Extensive hepatic metastases and tumor thrombus within the portal vein, superior portion of the SMV, and superior portion of the IMV. 3. Mass effect of this large splenic mass on the surrounding stomach, transverse colon, left adrenal gland and kidney without definite evidence of tumor invasion into these organs.
